title: Sending files shouldn’t be this hard
author: XubuntuBro
summary:
Every developer knows this feeling.

You're working on your laptop and need a file on your phone.
Or the other way around.

So what do you do?
Email it to yourself. Send it on WhatsApp.Upload to Google Drive just to download it 2 minutes later.

It feels wrong every time.

So I made something simpler — AcadShare.

  • Paste text or upload a file
  • Get a shareable link instantly
  • Set expiry time and download limit
  • Link auto-deletes after use
  • QR supported
  • No login needed
  • Simple, fast, and free.

👉https://tools.acadkits.dev/acadshare

Would love honest feedback from the dev community.
What would you add or change?
full_text:
Every developer knows this feeling.

You're working on your laptop and need a file on your phone.

Or the other way around.

So what do you do?

Email it to yourself. Send it on WhatsApp.Upload to Google Drive just to download it 2 minutes later.

It feels wrong every time.

So I made something simpler — AcadShare.

Paste text or upload a file

Get a shareable link instantly

Set expiry time and download limit

Link auto-deletes after use

QR supported

No login needed

Simple, fast, and free.

👉https://tools.acadkits.dev/acadshare

Would love honest feedback from the dev community.

What would you add or change?
